title: 20:06 â March 4, 2020
body_text:
20:06 â March 4, 2020
Availability of Unlocked Forms
Payment Solutions forms that arenât returned to Central 1 for processing are, for the most part, now available on the secure site in an unlocked state. This allows you to easily load these forms into your internal systems (e.g., banking system or learning management system), to add your own branding, or to make specific updates as required. However, you are responsible for:
â¢
Having your changes reviewed for compliance (where applicable). For example, Payorâs PAD Agreement, Form 1696, complies with CPA Rule H1, Pre-Authorized Debits. You must ensure that it remains so.
â¢
Monitoring the secure site for changes to these forms and updating them in your systems immediately.
Tip
:
To identify which forms are unlocked on the secure site go to the Document Library in the Payment Solutions Manual or the document library section in a specific Part of the manual. Unlocked forms are identified in the Format column.
Forms that are returned to Central 1 are published on the secure site in a locked state. This is to protect the integrity of these forms and ensure efficient processing at Central 1. If you plan only to import a form into your banking system or learning management system, Central 1 will typically provide an unlocked version if you:
â¢
Agree that the form is required only for import into an internal system.
â¢
Agree not to edit the form (including branding). If the form is changed in any way, Central 1 cannot accept it and you must resubmit the request using the authorized version.
â¢
Test the output of the form generated from your system, if applicable, with Central 1. Upon confirmation that the form has not been altered, you can begin using the form for requests to Central 1.
â¢
Monitor the secure site for changes to these forms and update them in your systems immediately.
How to Use this Manual Volume
How to Use this Manual Part

New section.
Section 2.4, Searching
We updated this section with the improved search functionality previously introduced on the system.
Section 2.10, Unlocked Forms
New section. We provided an explanation of your responsibilities for managing unlocked forms as well as instructions for requesting unlocked forms.
